description_long: This is a stylized female doll with a medium brown skin tone and large, expressive eyes. The doll has long, voluminous blonde hair styled in a side ponytail, with a prominent hair part and smooth, sculpted texture. She is dressed in a cropped white top with short sleeves and a pair of high-waisted, wide-legged pants featuring a light pink plaid pattern and white patches with an 'X' motif on the knees. The doll's right arm is raised and bent at the elbow, while the left arm is lowered and slightly bent, giving her a dynamic, waving pose. Her facial features include a small, closed smile, arched eyebrows, and defined lips, contributing to a friendly and approachable expression.
description: A stylized female doll with blonde hair in a side ponytail, wearing a cropped white top and pink plaid wide-legged pants with white patches. The doll has a friendly expression and is posed with one arm raised.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, blonde side ponytail, cropped white top, pink plaid pants, and raised right arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the full length of the ponytail, and the arm raised above the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with the ponytail, the bare back, and the pants' waistband.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, the ponytail, and the lowered left arm.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a cropped white short-sleeve top and high-waisted, wide-legged pants with a light pink plaid pattern and white patch details featuring an 'X' motif, reflecting a casual, playful, and trendy streetwear style.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with the right arm raised and bent at the elbow, left arm lowered and slightly bent, head facing forward, and legs straight and close together, suggesting a dynamic, waving gesture.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a small, closed smile with large, open eyes and arched eyebrows, giving a friendly and approachable expression.
attribute_hair_style: Long, smooth blonde hair styled in a voluminous side ponytail with a defined part.
